title: vepris pilosa
intro: Vepris pilosa, also known as the hairy vepris or hairy bitter, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vepris pilosa include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Vepris pilosa is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
